properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are times in this life when fear is so heavy And burdens weigh on your mind You are weak in the knees and no strength can you find Just hold on, helps right on time, my Jesus is always on time.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And though you may see a valley He sees the mountain you'll be standing on When all you can see are the tears falling down I'm so glad He sees what we don't.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've seen his children walk thru the darkest of midnight I've witnessed faith put to the test And I have watched as the storms flew in with the thunder But in each trial He knows what's best And I am so glad He knows what's best

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He knows the end from the beginning He looks ahead past the hurt and the pain To a place where the peace passes all understanding He sees the sun thru the rain
